text.title: Client Conventions Intake Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "engagement starts" to "intake-report committed + signed off". Decision-gates block on missing dimensions or mismatches.

step.name: interview
step.action: Run 30-min intake call walking the 8 dimensions. Capture answers verbatim. Record date.
step.decision-gate: If contact refuses or punts ("ask later") on >2 dimensions — STOP, escalate.

step.name: capture-from-repo
step.action: Parse `.github/`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `CONVENTIONS.md`, `.pre-commit-config.yaml`, `SECURITY.md`. Extract observed conventions per dimension.
step.decision-gate: If repo access blocked — STOP, escalate access.

step.name: cross-check
step.action: For each dimension, compare. Surface mismatches: stated vs observed snippet. Send list to contact for resolution.
step.output: mismatches[] with resolution per item OR resolved=true.
step.decision-gate: If > 2 unresolved mismatches — STOP, verdict block-stated-observed-mismatch.

step.name: signoff
step.action: Compose final report. Send to contact_email asking for signed_at confirmation by email reply.
step.decision-gate: If 7 days pass without reply — STOP, escalate to engagement sponsor.

step.name: commit
step.action: Validate against schema. Commit to repo `docs/conventions-intake-<YYYY-MM>.json` (or shared drive if no commit access). Open follow-up for quarterly re-intake.
step.decision-gate: Schema invalid — STOP, fix the report.
